title: Section 24
content: Every 1[State] Council shall be a body corporate by such name as may be notified by the 1[State] Government in the Official Gazette or, in the case of a Joint 1[State] Council, as may be determined in the agreement, having perpetual succession and a common seal with power to acquire and hold property, both movable and immovable, and shall by the said name sue and be sued.
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A. O. 1950, for "Provincial".
